reviews.review_description:
Pros: Virtualcast ON PC VR is a great experience. It's much more interactive than VRChat. The characters have more fluid motion (flowing hair, flappy clothing with physics), and you have so many fun items to enjoy (guns, grappling hooks, ball pits so much more). There are even tools to build things minecraft style. You can even drive vehicles/fly hovercrafts!!! You can make and import your own character or use tons of free (or paid) characters and assets available on THE SEED ONLINE.  The only caveat is that there is a language wall to access most things as this app is widely only available to Japanese users still. Though, once you're in the app, the menu items are in English and you should have no trouble. 

Cons: This non-tethered app available on the Oculus store here does not have rooms, it only has studios. This means, you barely have anywhere to go! I recommend downloading the PC app from steam instead to get the full AMAZING Virtualcast experience. Don't let this app fool you-- Virtualcast has so much more to offer. Honestly, I like it more than  VRChat as the experience is so interactive/immersive and feels much more like my idea of a virtual world.
You legit can't play with anyone there's barely English support, you can't join any rooms on quest and there's barely any avatars. Tho iLOVE moving hair so nice job on that part.
